name: alltrails-pp-mcp
description: Evidence-labeled, live-capable route map for AllTrails browser/mobile surfaces. Not an official API contract.

alltrails_access_token.title: ALLTRAILS_ACCESS_TOKEN
alltrails_access_token.description: Bearer token for authenticated AllTrails API requests.

alltrails_cookie.title: ALLTRAILS_COOKIE
alltrails_cookie.description: Raw AllTrails Cookie header for browser-session authenticated requests.

alltrails_csrf_token.title: ALLTRAILS_CSRF_TOKEN
alltrails_csrf_token.description: AllTrails CSRF token for browser-session write requests when required by the captured route.
